{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "cmd.exe used sc.exe to modify the 'Fax' service's binary path to execute PowerShell, started the service, and then reverted the service configuration. This behavior is consistent with T1543.003 (Windows Service: Service Binary Replacement) for persistence or execution, followed by cleanup.",
  "indicators": [
    "T1543.003",
    "service modification",
    "sc.exe",
    "powershell execution",
    "binPath modification",
    "cleanup"
  ]
}
